title: polygala chinensis var. orbicularis
intro: Polygala chinensis var. orbicularis, also known as Yuan Zhi or Chinese Foxglove, is a plant species that belongs to the family Polygalaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of cardiovascular and respiratory issues. The plant is valued for its adaptogenic, antioxidant, and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Polygala chinensis var. orbicularis include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
